summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Help & Guide feature and SMTP Guide modal in Tenant Admin portal. All functionality verified including navigation, content rendering, modal interactions, search functionality, and critical scope check confirming SMTP guide is absent from Platform Superadmin portal.
passed_tests: Sidebar 'Help & Guide' navigation item present and functional
Help & Guide page loads at /helpdemo/admin/help with all sections
Quick Start section displays 6 setup steps
Email Setup card with 'Common SMTP Settings' button present
Feature Guide displays 7 sections (Branding, Locations, Appointments, Availability, Bookings, Customers, Customise)
FAQ accordion with 5 items expands and collapses correctly
Contact Support section present with email link
SMTP Guide modal opens from Help page button (data-testid=help-open-smtp-guide)
SMTP modal search input filters providers correctly (tested with 'yahoo')
SMTP modal shows empty state for no search results (tested with gibberish)
SMTP modal closes with Escape key
Quick help button in sidebar footer (data-testid=quick-help-btn) navigates to help page
Account page displays 'View Common SMTP Settings' button (data-testid=open-smtp-guide)
Account page displays 'Not sure? View common settings' link (data-testid=port-smtp-guide-link)
Both SMTP guide buttons on Account page open the modal successfully
SCOPE CHECK PASSED: SMTP guide button NOT present in Platform Superadmin email settings
SCOPE CHECK PASSED: SMTP guide link NOT present in Platform Superadmin email settings
SCOPE CHECK PASSED: No SMTP guide text or functionality in Platform email modal
